name: Low Fat Poppy Seed Dressing
directions: Whisk together first 4 ingredients until smooth.
this is best when chilled before using.
Can use handheld electric beater for larger amounts.
This recipe can easily be doubled or more, but don't increase the sugar subsitute the same way.  You need to do a taste test to decide how much more you would like.

name: Cooked Coleslaw Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients except the mustard in a small saucepan.
Bring to a boil over high heat, reduce heat to medium.
Reduce heat if it cooks "too bubbly".
When completely chilled, whisk in mustard.

name: Fruity Vinaigrette Dressing & Salad
directions: Combine all dressing ingredients.  Serve over iceberg lettuce with diced apples and craisins.

name: Salad Dressing in a Snap
directions: Mix together and serve! Gets even better after a few days.

name: Low-Fat Sugar-Free Creamy Salad Dressing
directions: Place all ingredients into container or blender.
Blend with immersion blender (or just blend).

name: California Salad
directions: Mix the vegetable oil, vinegar, sugar, ketchup and onion powder to make the dressing.
Cut and prepare all the ingredients.

Ideally, serve all the ingredients separately so everyone can mix their own salad (leaving off anything they don't like) and so the chips and lettuce don't get soggy in the dressing.  If the salad will be eaten immediately and completely (no soggy, ruined leftovers) then it is ok to premix it in a bowl.
